title: jasminum dasyphyllum
intro: Jasminum dasyphyllum, also known as the fragrant jasmine or pink jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant is known for its fragrant flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum dasyphyllum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
